StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT clmns.column_id AS [ID], clmns.name AS [Name], ISNULL(dc.Name, N'') AS [DefaultConstraintName], clmns.is_nullable AS [Nullable], CAST(ISNULL(cik.index_column_id, 0) AS bit) AS [InPrimaryKey], clmns.is_identity AS [Identity], usrt.name AS [DataType], clmns.is_computed AS [Computed] FROM sys.tables AS tbl INNER JOIN sys.all_columns AS clmns ON clmns.object_id=tbl.object_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.default_constraints as dc ON clmns.default_object_id = dc.object_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.indexes AS ik ON ik.object_id = clmns.object_id and 1=ik.is_primary_key LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.index_columns AS cik ON cik.index_id = ik.index_id and cik.column_id = clmns.column_id and cik.object_id = clmns.object_id and 0 = cik.is_included_column LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.types AS usrt ON usrt.user_type_id = clmns.user_type_id WHERE (tbl.name=@_msparam_0 and SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id)=@_msparam_1) ORDER BY [ID] ASC

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pclass] as [o].[pclass]=(1) AND CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='U'

CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysobjvalues].[value] as [sov4].[value] IS NULL THEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[syscolpars].[status] as [c].[status]&(16)|CONVERT_IMPLICIT(int,isnull(CONVERT(tinyint,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysobjvalues].[value] as [sov7].[value],0),(0))&(2),0) ELSE (0) END,0)

([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(4096))=(4096) AND (serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>12 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>8 AND serverproperty('EngineEdition')<>5 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=12 OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=5 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(134217728))<>(0) OR serverproperty('EngineEdition')=8 AND ([mssqlsystemresource].[sys].[syscolpars].[status]&(-2147483648))<>(0))

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[nsclass] as [o].[nsclass]=(0) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pclass] as [o].[pclass]=(1) AND CONVERT(char(2),CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type]='ET' THEN 'U' ELSE [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[type] as [o].[type] END,0)='D ' AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pid] as [o].[pid]>(0) OR ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysschobjs].[pid] as [o].[pid]&(-536870912))=(-1610612736))

([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(67108864))=(0) AND (1)=CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(32),0) AND (([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))<(0) OR ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysidxstats].[status] as [i].[status]&(1))>(0))

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysiscols].[intprop] as [isc].[intprop]=[Union1232] AND (0)=CONVERT(bit,[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysiscols].[status] as [isc].[status]&(16),0) AND (([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysiscols].[status] as [isc].[status]&(2))<(0) OR ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysiscols].[status] as [isc].[status]&(2))>(0))
